wiki.summary: On his most viral hit yet, American singer, producer and scooter rider Oliver Tree puts himself in the shoes of a literal alien. “Alien Boy” appears as the introduction to, and is the title track of his debut EP. Despite not being a single, the song has racked up over 100 million streams on Spotify alone, marking it his most successful track on the platform to date. After the song’s release, it was combined with EP track “All That” for a double feature music video. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: On his most viral hit yet, American singer, producer and scooter rider Oliver Tree puts himself in the shoes of a literal alien. “Alien Boy” appears as the introduction to, and is the title track of his debut EP. Despite not being a single, the song has racked up over 100 million streams on Spotify alone, marking it his most successful track on the platform to date. After the song’s release, it was combined with EP track “All That” for a double feature music video. "'The song ‘Alien Boy’ is dedicated to all the alien boys and all the alien girls out there. The human experience is extremely strange. Most of us feel like aliens at some point. We feel like an outcast, but at the end of the day, who wants to be normal? This song is really about embracing our true selves and really letting your true self shine.'" – Oliver Tree on Apple Music Read more on Last.fm.
